payment_terms: Quarterly fees on average daily net asset value calculated in basis points varying by fund and share class, comprising service fees, administrative fees, sub-transfer-agent fees, and supplemental fees paid by different responsible parties (Transfer Agent, distributor, HFMC).
termination_clauses: Termination by any party upon 60 days' written notice
Termination by any party upon at least 30 days' written notice if required by applicable law, rule or regulation
Termination by any party upon at least 30 days' written notice upon material breach of the Agreement by the other party
Automatic immediate termination upon termination of the Participation Agreement
Termination with respect to a Portfolio upon effective date of such Portfolio's liquidation or merger with another portfolio that is not a series of the Funds
